name: momentto
description: Plataforma para criar páginas digitais personalizadas com QR Code.

scripts.zip: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$stagingRoot = Join-Path (Get-Location) '_release'; $projectDir = Join-Path $stagingRoot 'momentto'; if (Test-Path $stagingRoot) { Remove-Item $stagingRoot -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $projectDir | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Path 'backend','frontend','netlify','netlify.toml','package.json','package-lock.json','README.md','.gitignore' -Destination $projectDir -Recurse -Force; if (Test-Path (Join-Path $projectDir 'backend\.env')) { Remove-Item (Join-Path $projectDir 'backend\.env') -Force }; Get-ChildItem (Join-Path $projectDir 'backend\generated') -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne '.gitkeep' } | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force; if (Test-Path 'momentto.zip') { Remove-Item 'momentto.zip' -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path $projectDir -DestinationPath 'momentto.zip'"
